session.assistant:
Plan execution complete. Here's a summary of changes:
**PR #9144: https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/9144**
### Changes Made
**`src/erk/cli/commands/launch_cmd.py`**: - Removed `plan_id: str | None` parameter from `_dispatch_pr_rebase`, `_dispatch_pr_address`, `_dispatch_pr_rewrite` - Removed `"plan_number"` key from inputs dicts in those three functions - Changed `_dispatch_learn` to send `"pr_number"` instead of `"plan_number"` - Removed the `--plan` / `plan_number` Click option entirely - Consolidated learn workflow to use the existing `--pr` option - Removed the plan ID resolution block (step 6) and `inferred_branch` variable - Removed `plan_id=plan_id` keyword args from all dispatch calls - Updated help text, docstring, and examples
**`.github/workflows/pr-rebase.yml`, `pr-address.yml`, `pr-rewrite.yml`**: - Removed `plan_number` input definition entirely - Changed metadata steps to use `inputs.pr_number` instead of `inputs.plan_number` - Removed conditional `if: inputs.plan_number != ''` (now always runs since `pr_number` is always present)
**`.github/workflows/learn.yml`**: - Renamed `plan_id` input to `pr_number` - Updated all references (`run-name`, concurrency group, env vars)
**`tests/commands/launch/test_launch_cmd.py`** and **`test_launch_remote_paths.py`**: - Updated `--plan` → `--pr` in CLI invocations - Updated `plan_number` → `pr_number` in input assertions - Updated error message assertions
